title: EoE Video Version Next Time Previews
display_title: EoE Video Version Next Time Previews
wikitext:
[]: EoE Video Version Next Time Previews             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Jun 28, 2010 7:29 pm The Next Time Previews for the "Video Version" of EoE, only released on the Genesis Laser Discs of NGE were recently mentioned in this thread . I figured a thread dedicated just to the previews themselves would be good. As an aside, the Genesis Laser Discs contained the Director's Cut episodes instead of the On-Air versions. The Next Time Preview for Air was included in the Platinum DVD, which plays after Director's Cut Episode 24' ends: Dr. Nick wrote:

[]: Re: EoE Video Version Next Time Previews             Quote Post by ath » Tue Jun 29, 2010 3:24 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: Are the Next Time Previews for Video Version EoE at least included with Renewal, even though the Video Version of EoE itself isn't?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Jun 29, 2010 10:06 am Huh. I wonder why it was so hard for ADV to get their hands on it then. And thanks!

[]: Re: EoE Video Version Next Time Previews             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Tue Jun 29, 2010 10:56 am ath wrote: I don't remember about Renewal, but the live-action preview for 26' is included in some Platinum editions.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Jun 29, 2010 11:52 am Looking at the Renewal disc for 25-26, the Genesis 25' preview is actually there. Albeit interlaced.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Tue Jun 29, 2010 1:48 pm Reichu wrote: Looking at the Renewal disc for 25-26, the Genesis 25' preview is actually there. Albeit interlaced.

[]: Re: EoE Video Version Next Time Previews             Quote Post by ath » Tue Jun 29, 2010 2:05 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: Would those be the Japanese releases, then? I've never run across the live-action preview for episode 26 in my Platinum edition.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Jun 29, 2010 6:48 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: I have a way to de-interlace it if you're interested.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Jun 29, 2010 9:48 pm Reichu wrote: Looking at the Renewal disc for 25-26, the Genesis 25' preview is actually there.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Jun 29, 2010 9:59 pm Argh, notation for Jikai Yokoku is a pain... The previews I meant to refer to were the one following 24' (for 25') and the one following Genesis 25' (for 26'). Also, I bought the single discs, since the limited edition box set was out of my budget range.

[]:             Quote Post by berto » Wed Jun 30, 2010 5:02 pm I just ripped my VHS fansubed copy or the video version one or two weeks ago but it only came with the preview for episode 26'. (Ironicly, adam got me a better quality rip a day latter so I ended up having to make subs for that on my own.) You know this is the kinda stuff you'd find on YouTube, it's odd that it's not there. EDIT: Ok, I have them both. I have the Japanese DVD boxset of the entire Revival version. Disc 7 and 8 have these previews.

[]: EoE Video Version Next Time Previews             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Jun 28, 2010 7:29 pm The Next Time Previews for the "Video Version" of EoE, only released on the Genesis Laser Discs of NGE were recently mentioned in this thread . I figured a thread dedicated just to the previews themselves would be good. As an aside, the Genesis Laser Discs contained the Director's Cut episodes instead of the On-Air versions. The Next Time Preview for Air was included in the Platinum DVD, which plays after Director's Cut Episode 24' ends: Dr. Nick wrote:

[]: Re: EoE Video Version Next Time Previews             Quote Post by ath » Tue Jun 29, 2010 3:24 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: Are the Next Time Previews for Video Version EoE at least included with Renewal, even though the Video Version of EoE itself isn't?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Jun 29, 2010 10:06 am Huh. I wonder why it was so hard for ADV to get their hands on it then. And thanks!
